name: G-12 validate-all: --format json emits files_total, files_passed, files_failed, files_excluded_from_aggregation keys
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: x
rules: []
' > tree/google/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json 2>err.txt; grep -q '"files_total":' err.txt && grep -q '"files_passed":' err.txt && grep -q '"files_failed":' err.txt && grep -q '"files_excluded_from_aggregation":' err.txt && echo json_shape 1>&2
